productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Speedair Black Laptop Bag
description: Three way black laptop bag Two short handles, one completely detachable, adjustable shoulder strap and removable backpack straps that can be stowed inside a zipped pocket at the back when not in use Two main zipped compartments, one compartment is with a padded separator with Velcro straps to close and two zipped internal small compartments Two small zipped compartments in the front, one small compartment comes with pen holders and cable holders Warranty: 2 years
